name: procurement teams in mid-sized e-commerce companies using Shopify, processing 10–50 invoices/month tool
description: For procurement teams in mid-sized e-commerce companies using Shopify processing 10–50 invoices/month, delayed supplier status updates cause missed discounts and late orders. We provide real-time alerts instead of manual tracking of supplier status through emails and spreadsheets.
target_audience: procurement teams in mid-sized e-commerce companies using Shopify, processing 10–50 invoices/month
problem_solved: Inability to track supplier status changes in real-time.

locked_fields.primary_user: procurement teams in mid-sized e-commerce companies using Shopify, processing 10–50 invoices/month
locked_fields.primary_problem: Inability to track supplier status changes in real-time.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For procurement teams in mid-sized e-commerce companies using Shopify processing 10–50 invoices/month, delayed supplier status updates cause missed discounts and late orders. We provide real-time alerts instead of manual tracking of supplier status through emails and spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking of supplier status through emails and spreadsheets

one_liner: For procurement teams in mid-sized e-commerce companies using Shopify processing 10–50 invoices/month, delayed supplier status updates cause missed discounts and late orders. We provide real-time alerts instead of manual tracking of supplier status through emails and spreadsheets.
